name: Clam Stew with Shiitakes, Cinzano, Chorizo
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium red onion, halved and diced into half-inch pieces
1 Bunch thyme, leaves only, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Heat olive oil in a heavy-bottomed 6-quart pan until it begins to smoke.
3. Add onion and cook for about 8 minutes or until softened.
4. Add shiitake mushrooms and chorizó, cooking until the onion is soft.
5. Stir in Cinzano and bring mixture to a boil.
6. Add tomato sauce, white wine, and clams; cover pan and simmer until clams open.
7. While cooking, slice baguette into submarine sandwich pieces, brush with wine, oil, garlic, and thyme. Place unwrapped in oven for 5 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and cut bread into 4-inch pieces.
9. Serve the stew hot over the bread crumbs.
Yield: 4 servings
